description_long: This object is a shotgun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a compact receiver. The barrel is smooth and metallic, extending the majority of the object's length, and is attached to a rectangular receiver with a visible trigger and a short, stubby grip beneath. The receiver appears robust and boxy, with a magazine tube or similar cylindrical component beneath the barrel. The finish is dark and glossy, suggesting a metal construction, and the overall design is utilitarian with minimal ornamentation. The shotgun lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for one-handed operation. The trigger guard is small and rounded, closely hugging the trigger area.
description: A dark, glossy shotgun with a long barrel, compact receiver, and pistol grip, lacking a traditional stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the boxy receiver, and the pistol grip beneath.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the magazine tube below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the barrel and receiver details, with the grip and trigger visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the receiver and the back of the pistol grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth and long with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: small, rounded trigger guard closely fitted around the trigger
